title: lagerstroemia speciosa subsp. speciosa
intro: Lagerstroemia speciosa subsp. speciosa, also known as the queen of the flowers, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly the flowers and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia speciosa subsp. speciosa include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, lower blood pressure, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to alleviate symptoms of diabetes, hypertension, and other health issues.
